description: Explore Cairo, the capital of Egypt, known for its ancient pyramids, vibrant culture, and Nile River views.

hotels.name: Hyatt Regency Cairo West
hotels.description: Luxury hotel near Giza Pyramids with spa, pool, and premium dining experience.

hotels.name: Pyramisa Suites Hotel Cairo
hotels.description: Central Cairo hotel in Dokki with Nile views, spa, and multiple restaurants.

hotels.name: Steigenberger Hotel El Tahrir Cairo
hotels.description: Modern hotel in Tahrir Square overlooking the Egyptian Museum.

hotels.name: Hilton Cairo Grand Nile
hotels.description: Luxury Nile-view hotel with multiple restaurants, entertainment, and spa.

hotels.name: Safir Hotel Cairo
hotels.description: Comfortable hotel in central Cairo with pool, spa, and good value.

description: Discover Alexandria, the Mediterranean jewel of Egypt, known for its rich history, sea views, and cultural landmarks.

hotels.name: Le Metropole Luxury Heritage Hotel
hotels.description: Historic luxury hotel overlooking the Mediterranean with elegant rooms and French dining.

hotels.name: Steigenberger Cecil Hotel Alexandria
hotels.description: Elegant historic hotel in the heart of Alexandria overlooking the sea and yacht club.

hotels.name: Nubian Village by the Sea
hotels.description: Beachfront apartment-style stay with sea views, ideal for families and groups.

hotels.name: Windsor Palace Hotel
hotels.description: Historic waterfront hotel with rooftop views and classic luxury interiors.

hotels.name: Downtown Sea View Suites
hotels.description: Modern apartment-style suites with sea views and full amenities in central Alexandria.

description: Explore Amman, the capital of Jordan, known for its ancient history, vibrant culture, and modern lifestyle.

hotels.name: Coral Tower Hotel
hotels.description: Modern hotel located in Abdali Boulevard offering comfortable rooms and business-friendly facilities.

hotels.name: DoubleTree by Hilton Amman
hotels.description: Luxury hotel with indoor and outdoor pools, premium services, and modern accommodations.

hotels.name: Boho Boutique Hotel Amman
hotels.description: Affordable boutique hotel offering cozy rooms and central location in Amman.

hotels.name: Radisson Blu Hotel Amman Galleria Mall
hotels.description: Luxury hotel connected to Galleria Mall offering modern rooms and premium facilities.

description: Discover Aswan, the peaceful city along the Nile, known for its stunning river views, islands, and ancient history.

hotels.name: Movenpick Resort Aswan
hotels.description: Luxury island resort on Elephantine Island offering panoramic Nile views and peaceful atmosphere.

hotels.name: Sofitel Legend Old Cataract
hotels.description: Historic luxury hotel on the Nile, known for its royal heritage and Agatha Christie legacy.

hotels.name: Tolip Aswan Hotel
hotels.description: Modern hotel on the Nile Corniche offering great location and good value.

hotels.name: Pyramisa Island Resort Aswan
hotels.description: Relaxing island resort surrounded by nature with private beaches and pools.

hotels.name: Basma Hotel Aswan
hotels.description: Hilltop hotel offering panoramic views of the Nile and peaceful artistic atmosphere.

description: A luxury Red Sea destination known for beaches, diving, and world-class resorts.

hotels.name: Pickalbatros Laguna Club Resort
hotels.description: Luxury resort with private beach, aqua park, and multiple dining options.

hotels.name: Cleopatra Luxury Resort Sharm
hotels.description: Adults-only luxury resort with spa, private beach, and fine dining.

hotels.name: White Hills Resort
hotels.description: High-end beachfront resort with luxury spa and diving experiences.

hotels.name: Sunrise Montemare Resort
hotels.description: Luxury resort with private beach, spa, and fine dining restaurants.

hotels.name: Xperience Kiroseiz Parkland
hotels.description: All-inclusive resort with aqua park and multiple pools near Naama Bay.

description: Hurghada is a top Red Sea destination known for its beaches, resorts, and diving spots.

hotels.name: Steigenberger ALDAU Beach Hotel
hotels.description: Luxury beachfront hotel with large gardens, private beach, and premium service.

hotels.name: SUNRISE Garden Beach Resort
hotels.description: Family-friendly resort with water park and daily entertainment.

hotels.name: Pickalbatros Alf Leila Wa Leila
hotels.description: Entertainment-themed resort inspired by Arabian Nights with aqua park.

hotels.name: The Makadi Spa Hotel
hotels.description: Adults-only peaceful resort perfect for couples and honeymoon.

hotels.name: The Oberoi Beach Resort

description: Explore London, the capital of the United Kingdom, a 21st-century city with history stretching back to Roman times, known for its iconic landmarks and vibrant culture.

hotels.name: Hyatt Regency London - The Churchill
hotels.description: Luxury hotel in Marylebone, near Hyde Park and Oxford Street, featuring family-friendly suites and unique Churchill-themed artwork.

hotels.name: St. James' Court, A Taj Hotel, London
hotels.description: Centrally located luxury hotel near Buckingham Palace with a peaceful courtyard and Michelin-starred dining.

hotels.name: Chapter Ealing in North Acton
hotels.description: Practical and eco-friendly accommodation with kitchenettes, ideal for budget-conscious solo travelers and short stays.

hotels.name: Park Plaza London Waterloo
hotels.description: Modern hotel near London Eye and South Bank featuring an indoor pool and rooms with London skyline views.

hotels.name: The Prince Akatoki London
hotels.description: Luxury 5-star experience inspired by Japanese hospitality, featuring minimalist design and a tranquil atmosphere.

description: Abu Dhabi, the capital of the UAE, features a blend of ancient heritage and modern architecture on the shores of the Arabian Gulf.

hotels.name: Emirates Palace Mandarin Oriental
hotels.description: An architectural masterpiece with Islamic inspiration, featuring 394 luxury rooms and a dome coated in 22-carat gold.

hotels.name: The St. Regis Abu Dhabi
hotels.description: A luxury 54-story tower overlooking the Corniche with stunning views of the Gulf and Abu Dhabi skyline.

hotels.name: Hilton Abu Dhabi Corniche
hotels.description: A 4-star hotel on the Corniche coast, offering a private beach and comprehensive facilities at reasonable prices.

hotels.name: Yas Island Rotana
hotels.description: Excellent value hotel located next to Yas Marina Circuit and Yas Mall, ideal for entertainment lovers.

hotels.name: Citymax Boutique
hotels.description: Budget boutique hotel offering clean and comfortable service in the heart of Abu Dhabi.

description: Explore Dubai, a world-class city known for luxury hotels, modern architecture, shopping destinations, and vibrant urban experiences.

hotels.description: Elegant 5-star hotel offering luxury spa, wellness center, pool, and stunning Creek Harbour views with premium hospitality.

description: Doha, the capital of Qatar, offers a unique blend of authentic Gulf heritage and modern skylines on the Eastern Corniche.

hotels.name: Four Seasons Hotel Doha
hotels.description: An architectural masterpiece on the Doha Corniche, blending international luxury with Gulf authenticity.

hotels.name: Sheraton Grand Doha Resort
hotels.description: A historic Doha landmark with its unique pyramidal design, featuring vast gardens and a private lagoon.

hotels.name: Crowne Plaza Doha
hotels.description: A premium business hotel in the heart of Doha's commercial district, providing high-level conference services.

hotels.name: citizenM Doha
hotels.description: A modern boutique technology hotel in the Msheireb Heritage District. Everything is app-controlled.

hotels.name: Liwan Hotel Apartments
hotels.description: Fully equipped hotel apartments, an excellent choice for long stays or families.

description: Barcelona, a Mediterranean jewel known for its unique art, modernist architecture by Gaudí, and vibrant culinary scene in the heart of Catalonia.

hotels.name: Hotel El Palace Barcelona
hotels.description: A historic luxury hotel opened in 1919, featuring a neo-classical façade, a Mayan-style luxury spa, and a rooftop garden with panoramic city views.

hotels.name: Renaissance Barcelona Hotel
hotels.description: An elegant hotel in the heart of the city featuring Gaudí-inspired décor and a stylish rooftop bar (Goja Rooftop) offering Mediterranean cuisine.

hotels.name: Novotel Barcelona City
hotels.description: Situated in the avant-garde area near Glories Tower, this hotel offers a seasonal rooftop pool and Mediterranean dining with panoramic views.

hotels.name: Barceló Raval
hotels.description: A modern and sophisticated design hotel in the vibrant El Raval neighborhood, famous for its 360º panoramic rooftop terrace and pool.

hotels.name: Astoria Hotel
hotels.description: Combines original Art Nouveau features with modern facilities, located just off Diagonal Avenue with a seasonal rooftop pool.

description: Paris, the City of Light, is a world capital of art, fashion, and gastronomy. It is famous for its iconic landmarks, romantic atmosphere, and rich historical heritage.

hotels.name: Hôtel du Collectionneur
hotels.description: Featuring Art Deco décor, this hotel is a 10-minute walk from the Champs-Élysées. It offers a new luxury spa and an Andalusian courtyard.

roomTypes.name: Deluxe Room with Two Double Beds

hotels.name: Hotel SAX Paris, LXR Hotels & Resorts
hotels.description: A luxury 5-star property located near the Rodin Museum, offering an outdoor pool, a garden, and exceptional personalized service.

hotels.name: Pullman Paris Eiffel Tower
hotels.description: Located at the foot of the Eiffel Tower, this hotel offers spectacular views and a seasonal rooftop bar called '10e Ciel'.

hotels.name: Rochester Champs Elysees
hotels.description: A 4-star hotel steps from the Champs-Élysées, featuring a classic French style, a spa with hammam, and a cozy lounge bar.

hotels.name: Hôtel Eden Opéra
hotels.description: Located near Pigalle, this modern hotel features a sake bar and the 'Le Pigalle Fromage Club' restaurant.

description: The Eternal City, where ancient history meets modern life. From the iconic Colosseum to the artistic treasures of the Vatican, Rome is a living museum under the Mediterranean sun.

hotels.name: Hotel Palazzo Manfredi
hotels.description: A luxury hotel offering stunning views of the Colosseum from its rooftop terrace. Known for its elegant rooms and the unique opportunity to rent a Lamborghini.

hotels.name: Singer Palace Hotel Roma
hotels.description: Set on the famous Via del Corso shopping street, this boutique hotel features a rooftop restaurant and elegant Art Deco-inspired design.

hotels.name: Hotel dei Barbieri
hotels.description: A stylish and modern hotel located near Largo Argentina, offering contemporary design within walking distance of the Pantheon and Piazza Navona.

hotels.name: FH55 Grand Hotel Palatino
hotels.description: Located in the historic Monti District, this hotel offers a generous American bar and traditional Roman dishes at Le Spighe restaurant.

hotels.name: Hotel Alessandrino
hotels.description: A quiet residential hotel near the Vatican, featuring a rooftop terrace with breathtaking views of St. Peter's Basilica.

description: The entertainment capital of the world, Los Angeles offers iconic Hollywood landmarks, stunning Pacific beaches, and a diverse cultural landscape from Downtown to Santa Monica.

hotels.name: InterContinental - Los Angeles Downtown
hotels.description: Located in the tallest building in the West, this hotel features Spire 73, the tallest open-air bar in the Western Hemisphere, and an outdoor pool.

hotels.name: Level Hollywood
hotels.description: Sophisticated apartment-style living with full kitchens and in-suite laundry, plus premium amenities like a steam room and outdoor pool.

hotels.name: The LINE Hotel LA
hotels.description: A stylish mid-century building in Koreatown featuring floor-to-ceiling windows and poolside dining at Openaire Restaurant.

hotels.name: The Biltmore Los Angeles
hotels.description: An iconic historic landmark in the heart of Downtown, featuring a Roman-style indoor pool and timeless grand architecture.

hotels.name: Olyver Hotel
hotels.description: A comfortable 3-star hotel offering budget-friendly accommodations with an on-site restaurant serving Korean cuisine.

description: The city that never sleeps. From the bright lights of Times Square to the green expanse of Central Park, New York City is a global hub of culture, fashion, and history.

hotels.name: New York Marriott Marquis
hotels.description: An iconic hotel in the heart of Times Square featuring 'The View', NYC’s only revolving rooftop restaurant, and spacious, recently renovated accommodations.

roomTypes.name: Deluxe One Bedroom Suite (M Club Access)

hotels.name: Iroquois New York Times Square
hotels.description: A luxury boutique hotel offering celebrity-style treatment, a Finnish sauna, and nightly turn-down service with Le Belge chocolates.

hotels.name: Hilton New York Times Square
hotels.description: Boasting unparalleled city views and themed suites, this hotel is steps away from Broadway and the New York Public Library.

hotels.name: Element Times Square West
hotels.description: A stylish hotel in the Theater District offering rooms with kitchenettes, perfect for longer stays and independent living.

hotels.name: Four Points by Sheraton New York Downtown
hotels.description: Ideally located in the Financial District, providing simple and practical accommodations near Wall Street and Ground Zero.

description: Where East meets West, Istanbul is a city of timeless beauty, vibrant bazaars, and majestic mosques, spanning across two continents along the Bosphorus.

hotels.name: Ramada By Wyndham Istanbul Pera Taksim
hotels.description: Located in the vibrant Pera/Taksim area, this hotel features uniquely decorated rooms with quotes from famous philosophers and a Mediterranean restaurant with a summer balcony.

hotels.name: Days Inn & Suites by Wyndham Istanbul Esenyurt
hotels.description: A world-class service experience offering a rooftop pool, hammam, and a family-friendly restaurant serving American cuisine with halal options.

hotels.name: Pisa Hotel
hotels.description: Situated in the heart of the Laleli district, within walking distance of the Grand Bazaar and Suleymaniye Mosque, offering a rich buffet breakfast.

hotels.name: La Wisteria Boutique Hotel Istanbul
hotels.description: A modern boutique property in the Sisli district, only 5 years old, featuring Turkish bath facilities and views of the city near Bomontiada.

hotels.name: The Prenses Hotel Yenikapi Istanbul
hotels.description: Conveniently located near Yenikapi station and the Column of Constantine, this hotel offers family-friendly rooms with parquet floors and a city terrace.

description: A seamless blend of ancient traditions and futuristic technology, Tokyo offers neon-lit skyscrapers, serene temples, and world-class culinary experiences across its diverse wards.

hotels.name: Grand Prince Hotel Shin Takanawa
hotels.description: Offering a 5-star experience in Minato-ku, this hotel features spacious rooms with balconies, a beautiful garden, and a romantic restaurant serving diverse Asian cuisines.

roomTypes.name: Club King Room with Lounge Access

hotels.name: Grand Nikko Tokyo Daiba
hotels.description: A city resort in the Tokyo Bay area, offering panoramic views of the Rainbow Bridge and Tokyo Tower from its upper floors and spectacular dining on the 30th floor.

hotels.name: Hotel Yaenomidori Tokyo
hotels.description: A pleasant stay featuring Japanese cuisine at the on-site restaurant and air-conditioned rooms equipped with bidets and work desks.

hotels.name: Ueno Rose
hotels.description: Spacious apartment-style living in the city centre, featuring a fully equipped kitchen, sauna, and hot tub facilities near Akiba Shrine.

hotels.name: Sakura Hotel Nippori
hotels.description: Conveniently located near Sendagi Station, offering a mix of Western-style and Japanese-style rooms with shared facilities and a continental breakfast.

description: A tropical paradise of pristine white beaches and turquoise lagoons. The Maldives is the ultimate destination for luxury overwater villas, world-class diving, and unparalleled serenity.

hotels.name: Constance Moofushi Maldives - All Inclusive
hotels.description: A luxurious beach escape in the South Ari Atoll featuring an infinity pool, overwater spa, and designer villas with uninterrupted Indian Ocean views.

hotels.name: Heritance Aarah - Premium All Inclusive
hotels.description: A premium resort in the Raa Atoll accessible by seaplane, offering an extensive dining package across 5 restaurants and exclusive ocean suites with butler service.

hotels.name: Sevinex Inn
hotels.description: A charming guest house on Feridhoo Island offering a private beach area, free bicycles, and activities like snorkeling and cycling for a local Maldivian experience.

description: The holiest city in Islam and the birthplace of Prophet Muhammad. Makkah is the center of the Islamic world, attracting millions of pilgrims annually for Hajj and Umrah at the Masjid Al Haram.

hotels.name: Park Inn by Radisson Makkah Aziziyah
hotels.description: Elegant 5-star accommodation in Aziziyah featuring spacious air-conditioned rooms, a steam room, and a family-friendly restaurant serving global cuisines.

hotels.name: DoubleTree by Hilton Makkah Aziziyah
hotels.description: A modern stay near Um AlQura University offering family rooms, a kids' club, and an international restaurant with a buffet breakfast.

roomTypes.name: Deluxe Triple Room with City View

hotels.name: Le Meridien Towers Makkah
hotels.description: Elegant suites equipped with kitchenettes, offering a 24-hour free shuttle service to Masjid Al Haram (3 minutes away) and rich local cuisine.

hotels.name: Al Kiram Hotel Al Azizia
hotels.description: A well-located hotel in Aziziyah near Madhbaḩ Ismā‘īl, featuring soundproofed family rooms and attentive staff services.

hotels.name: Al Kiswah Towers Hotel
hotels.description: Strategically located just 900m from Masjid Al Haram, providing modern and practical rooms with easy access to major pilgrimage sites.

description: The Bride of the Red Sea, Jeddah is a major port city known for its stunning corniche, historic Al-Balad district, and vibrant shopping malls, serving as a gateway for pilgrims to Makkah.

hotels.name: JOUDYAN Red Sea Mall Jeddah
hotels.description: Attached to Jeddah’s Red Sea Mall, this modern hotel offers stylish rooms with floor-to-ceiling windows and panoramic Red Sea views, featuring a spa with a steam bath and a tennis court.

hotels.name: Best Western Plus Jeddah Hotel Madinah Road
hotels.description: Located near Mall of Arabia, this hotel features a rooftop swimming pool, diverse dining options including African and British cuisines, and modern rooms with work desks.

hotels.name: Hayat Al Rose Hotel Appartment
hotels.description: Aparthotel-style units featuring kitchenettes and washing machines, conveniently located a short walk from the Jeddah International Exhibition Center.

hotels.name: Crown Town Hotel
hotels.description: Featuring a year-round outdoor pool and close proximity to King Fahad Fountain, this hotel offers comfortable rooms with seating areas and an on-site restaurant.

roomTypes.name: Deluxe Double Room - Partial Sea View

hotels.name: Novotel Jeddah Tahlia
hotels.description: Strategically located on the famous Tahlia Street, offering rooftop pool access and panoramic city views from The Palm restaurant.

roomTypes.name: Superior Double Room with Sofa Bed

description: The second holiest city in Islam, Al Madinah is home to Al-Masjid an-Nabawi (The Prophet's Mosque). It is a city of immense spiritual significance, peace, and Islamic history.

hotels.name: Sofitel Shahd Al Madinah
hotels.description: Located in the pedestrian area just a minute's walk from Al-Masjid an-Nabawi, this luxury hotel features partial Haram views, the exclusive Club Sofitel, and international dining at Arabesque.

hotels.name: Millennium Taiba Hotel
hotels.description: Offering a modern and traditional ambiance just 8 minutes from the Prophet's Mosque, featuring a fitness centre and a variety of international breakfast options.

roomTypes.name: Superior Twin Room with City View

hotels.name: Tulip Inn Al Daar Rawafid
hotels.description: An exceptionally located 3-star hotel less than 10 meters from Al-Masjid an-Nabawi (Door 9), providing advice for local planning and international breakfast.

hotels.name: Al Ansar Palace Golden Tulip Hotel
hotels.description: Located on the north side of the Prophet's Mosque, this hotel is just a 4-minute walk to the women's entrance (Gate 24) and features 24-hour room service and a trendy café.

location.address: North side of the Prophet's Mosque

hotels.name: Al Madina Golden Hotel
hotels.description: A comfortable 1-star option located only a 5-minute walk from Al-Masjid an-Nabawi, offering essential facilities and full-day security for budget-conscious travelers.
